chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.526 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2731/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.2732/2026 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 18.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Rehman, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP IO/SIP Muhammad Nawab Tarar ------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that IO of the case has recommended the same for disposal in cancel “C” class and learned concerned Magistrate has approved such summary and released the applicant. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
